feat.name: Know Your Enemy
feat.text: You aim to turn knowledge into power against your foes. Attempt a Recall Knowledge check against an enemy you’re observing. Any ally within your aura who’s trained in the skill you use to attempt the Recall Knowledge check can use their reaction to Aid you on the check without having prepared to help first.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
